title: HiveMind: OS-Inspired Scheduling for Concurrent LLM Agent Workloads
summary: When multiple LLM coding agents share a rate-limited API endpoint, they exhibit resource contention patterns analogous to unscheduled OS processes competing for CPU, memory, and I/O. In a motivating incident, 3 of 11 parallel agents died...
